Enter ZIP code
How it works
  1. Confirm your location below and click "Add Professional Installation".
  2. After you complete your purchase, you'll receive an email with a link to schedule your installation when your device ships.
  3. A certified technician will come set up and install your device.
How it works
  1. Confirm your location below and click "Add Professional Installation".
  2. Complete checkout and book an appointment through the link on the order confirmation page or in your confirmation email.
  3. A certified technician will come set up and install your device.

Note: Pricing starts at $129.99 per device (billed separately). You will not pay until you schedule your appointment after you complete your order purchase. Actual cost may vary depending on which device(s) are professionally installed.

Professional installation is available in your area.
What's included in your service:
  • Professional mounting and wiring of your new devices (one installation covers one device)
  • Complete removal — unwiring and dismounting of your existing device
  • Device configuration — WiFi, Ring app, and smart home integration
  • Hands-on training for your device and mobile app features

Modifications and extensions to existing wiring available at additional cost (billed separately). Extension available only for low-voltage wiring (PoE or Plug-in USB-C).

Does not ship to Canada.

Show More

Ring's most advanced anywhere-ready outdoor camera, loaded with the ultimate image clarity and security features.


  • Retinal 4K1 with up to 10x Enhanced Zoom – Capture wide-angle video even at a distance.
  • Night Vision – Get true color video in the near-dark with just a little ambient light, plus sharp black and white detail in total darkness.
  • 3D Motion Detection – Receive real-time phone alerts, delivered by radar-powered motion detection.
  • Live View & Two-Way Talk with Audio+ – See, hear, and speak to who's there in real time.
  • Protection Anywhere – Mount or place to secure any space, no matter the weather.

Please note:

  • To install Outdoor Cam Pro, Power over Ethernet, you need a PoE+ (also known as IEEE 802.3at) power supply (either a PoE+ switch or power injector with Ethernet port), plus a CAT5 or higher Ethernet cable. Understanding PoE+.
  • This item includes a free 30-day trial of Ring Protect2

View Tech Specs.

Which camera is right for you? Compare cameras.

Recommended for you

Retinal 4K

Night Vision

Wide Field of View

10x Enhanced Zoom

Motion Detection & Alerts

Ultimate 4K clarity. Ultimate outdoor protection.

Supercharge your security with Outdoor Cam Pro. See it all with Retinal 4K, featuring wide-angle video that captures detail in any light — even at a distance. Protect what’s yours with the power and precision of Ring’s most advanced anywhere-ready outdoor camera.

Retinal 4K

Ultra clear. Crazy sharp. Every detail.

Retinal 4K pushes your image quality to a whole new level. Zoom in up to 10x and see finer details with incredible definition in any light.

At Ring, we don’t just offer great resolution, we tune everything — from our cameras to the Ring app — to capture and display video with our highest clarity, sharpness, and color accuracy in low-light conditions. It’s performance hardware and powerful processing working seamlessly together. The result? Crisp, true-to-life video from your property to your phone.

10x Enhanced Zoom

Capture detail even at a distance.

Get even closer to the action with up to 10x Enhanced Zoom that automatically sharpens what you’re focused on. Near or far, see every detail in the ultimate clarity and color — powered by Retinal 4K.

Low light? No light? No worries.

Low-light or pitch-black conditions won’t compromise your security. Night Vision delivers exceptional visibility in any light.

True colors in low light.

When light is scarce, Night Vision gives you a true-color view — perfect for verifying visitors at dusk or watching your kids' evening basketball game. Nearby street lighting is all you need.

See through the darkness.

Night Vision automatically adapts to total darkness, revealing more detail in no-light conditions and lowering the overexposure and intensity of close-up objects.

3D Motion Detection

Precise alerts, not interruptions.

The radar-powered precision of 3D Motion Detection delivers super-accurate alerts tailored to your home. Map out zones to know about security events like activity in the driveway, but not the sidewalk.

Goes anywhere outdoors

With an easy-to-install mount, weather-resistant build, and multiple power options, Outdoor Cam Pro goes exactly where you need it most. Mount it in your side yard. Hang it from your porch ceiling. Set it by the grill. Want it indoors? That works, too. Outdoor Cam Pro is built for outside, but ready for anywhere.

Complete control
from the Ring app.

See, hear, and do it all from the palm
of your hand with the free Ring app.

Safety Alerts

Stay connected to your community with real-time crime and safety alerts from your neighbors and local public safety agencies.

Customizable Privacy Zones

Monitor the areas that matter most to you — and leave out what doesn’t.

Quick Replies

Deter unwanted activity with pre-recorded responses that play when a person is detected. Available in select languages. Subscription required, sold separately.

Connected Devices

Connect select Ring devices to see what’s happening and control them all from a single dashboard.

Security & Privacy Control

Control Center allows you to view, control, and customize important security settings.

Ring Protect Plans

See more. Know more. Protect more.

Subscribe to a compatible Protect Plan to rewatch moments you missed, unlock intelligent recognition, get emergency monitoring, and more. You'll only pay for what you need.

Learn More

  • Device Modes
    Customize when your cameras record, remotely Arm and Disarm your Ring Alarm, and more, all in the Ring app.
  • Single Event AlertBeta
    Lots happening? We get it. Now your camera recognizes similar motion to send you one combined alert.6
  • Up to 180 Days of Video History
    Save, share and replay recorded videos of every doorbell ring, motion event, and Live View event for up to 180 days.3
  • Video Descriptions
    Get more details, faster, with text descriptions that explain what triggered a motion alert — no need to open the Ring app.4
  • Familiar FacesBeta
    Easily tag your family and friends in the Ring app so your cameras can notify you when someone is spotted.5
  • Device Modes
    Customize when your cameras record, remotely Arm and Disarm your Ring Alarm, and more, all in the Ring app.
  • Single Event AlertBeta
    Lots happening? We get it. Now your camera recognizes similar motion to send you one combined alert.6

  • Video Descriptions
    Get more details, faster, with text descriptions that explain what triggered a motion alert — no need to open the Ring app.4

Tech Specs - Outdoor Cam Pro, Plug-In

Size and Color

Dimensions

2.8 in x 5.7 in x 2.8 in (7 cm x 14.5 cm x 7 cm) including stand base and universal mounting plate

 Available Colors

White

Features

Video

4K video resolution, Night Vision, up to 10x Enhanced Zoom

 Motion Detection

3D Motion Detection with Customizable Motion Zones

 Field of View

140° Horizontal, 85° Vertical

 Audio

Two-Way Talk with Audio+ and advanced noise cancellation

 Siren

Remote-activated security siren

Power and Connectivity

Power

USB-C 17.8 ft (5.45 m) 20W Outdoor/Indoor Power Adapter

 Internet Requirements

Recommended minimum upload speed of 15 Mbps for optimal performance. Video resolution may vary depending on internet bandwidth.

 Connectivity

Wifi 6 (802.11ax), Dual-band wifi connection @ 2.4GHz, 5.0GHz powered by MediaTek Filogic WiFi

Installation

Estimated Install Time

10 minutes

 Operating Conditions

-5°F to 120°F (-20.5°C to 48.5°C), Weather Resistant
Camera may temporarily turn off when exposed to direct sunlight in extreme heat conditions.

 Setup Requirement

Vertical or horizontal surface for mounting
Standard power outlet

General

Box Includes

Outdoor Cam Pro (Plug-In)
Outdoor/Indoor Power Adapter

Tech Specs - PoE+ Converter Mount

Supported Devices

Supported Devices

Outdoor Cam Plus, Outdoor Cam Pro, Spotlight Cam Pro (2nd Gen)

Size and Color

Dimensions

2.66 x 2.66 x 2.61 in (6.76 x 6.76 x 6.65 cm)

 Available Colors

Black, White

Power and Connectivity

Power Input

PoE+ (also known as IEEE 802.3at) power supply (either a PoE+ switch or power injector with Ethernet port)

 Connectivity

Ethernet, CAT5 or higher Ethernet cable

Installation

Estimated Install Time

<10 minutes

 Operating Conditions

-4F to 122F (-20C to 50C), Weather Resistant.

 Setup Requirement

Requires existing PoE+ power supply (PoE+ switch or power injector with Ethernet port).
Can be mounted on a wall or ceiling.
Professional installation recommended.

General

Box Includes

PoE+ Converter Mount, Spacer, 1/4" UNC Hex Insert, Decorative Covers (Outdoor Cam Plus, Outdoor Cam Pro, Spotlight Cam Pro), Long Screws, Short Screws, Anchors

 Warranty

One-Year limited warranty

Frequently Asked Questions

What is the minimum internet speed required for 4K streaming?

A minimum upload speed of 15 Mbps is recommended. For the best experience with 4K video recording and streaming, we recommend at least 20 Mbps upload speed.

Will the camera automatically adjust video quality based on internet speed?

Yes, the camera features adaptive bit rate streaming technology that automatically adjusts video quality based on your available bandwidth to maintain a stable connection.

What is 4K video quality?

Outdoor Cam Pro features Retinal 4K video quality, which means it captures footage at a resolution of 3840 x 2160 pixels. When viewing the same field of view, this provides four times the detail of 1080p HD, resulting in clear and crisp video. The 4K resolution allows for more detailed zooming without losing image quality, making it easier to identify people, objects, or license plates in the footage.

How does 10x Enhanced Zoom work on Outdoor Cam Pro?

Outdoor Cam Pro can get closer to the action with up to 10x Enhanced Zoom, available in the Ring app. This feature uses 4K resolution to maintain clarity even when zoomed in, allowing you to get a closer look at important details and identify people, objects, or license plates with greater accuracy.

How does Adaptive Night Vision work?

Adaptive Night Vision automatically adjusts illumination for clear nighttime recordings. It creates balanced coverage areas that reduce dark shadows and bright spots, while infrared lighting works with the camera's sensors to provide even illumination where needed. This ensures consistent video quality in challenging lighting conditions.

What privacy features are included with Outdoor Cam Pro?

Outdoor Cam Pro allows you to configure your privacy settings depending on your needs. Create Privacy Zones that block certain zones you don’t want to record. Toggle Motion Alerts and motion or audio recording off in the Ring app at any time. Create a motion schedule to enable Motion Alerts and recording during the times you're usually away. Use Modes to select a camera state with Disarmed, Home, or Away Mode (subscription required, sold separately).

Is a Ring Protect subscription required for Outdoor Cam Pro?

No. You can still use your doorbell or camera to watch over your home and answer the door from anywhere, even without a subscription to Ring Protect. Without Ring Protect, you'll still receive real-time notifications when anyone comes to your door, and you can answer the notification to see hear, and speak to visitors in real time right from your mobile device. When you access your Ring Dashboard, you'll be able to view the image last captured by active devices.

However, without a subscription to Ring Protect, you won't be able to review any videos or images you missed, and you won't be able to save your videos or photos or share them with anyone. Click here to learn more about Ring Protect and to choose a plan that works for you.

Does Outdoor Cam Pro work with Alexa and other smart home systems?

Yes, the camera is fully compatible with Alexa-enabled devices. You can use voice commands to view live feeds on Echo Show devices, Fire TV, or Fire Tablets. The camera also works with other smart home platforms through Ring's Works With Ring program.

What is the PoE+ Converter Mount and what additional equipment do I need to use it?

The PoE+ Converter Mount is designed to enable Power over Ethernet+ (PoE+) connectivity for your Ring devices, allowing your cameras to receive both power and data through a single Ethernet cable for a more reliable connection compared to Wi-Fi or battery-powered options. The mount does not include an Ethernet cable - you will need to purchase a PoE+ (IEEE 802.3at) power supply (either a PoE+ switch or power injector with Ethernet port) and a CAT5 or higher Ethernet cable separately.

Where can I install the PoE+ Converter Mount and do I need professional help?

The PoE+ Converter Mount can be installed both indoors and outdoors, on walls or ceilings. While the installation is designed to be straightforward - simply mount the device, connect your Ring camera via the USB-C cable, and plug in an PoE+ Ethernet cable - you may want to consider professional installation if you're not familiar with PoE+ technology.

How it works
  1. Confirm your location below and click "Add Professional Installation".
  2. After you complete your purchase, you'll receive an email with a link to schedule your installation when your device ships.

How it works
  1. Confirm your location below and click "Add Professional Installation".
  2. Complete checkout and book an appointment through the link on the order confirmation page or in your confirmation email.
  3. A certified technician will come set up and install your device.

Note: Pricing starts at $129.99 per device (billed separately). You will not pay until you schedule your appointment after you complete your order purchase. Actual cost may vary depending on which device(s) are professionally installed.

Professional installation is available in your area.
What's included in your service:
  • Professional mounting and wiring of your new devices (one installation covers one device)
  • Complete removal — unwiring and dismounting of your existing device
  • Device configuration — WiFi, Ring app, and smart home integration
  • Hands-on training for your device and mobile app features

Modifications and extensions to existing wiring available at additional cost (billed separately). Extension available only for low-voltage wiring (PoE or Plug-in USB-C).
